scripts.dev: concurrently --names API,CMS,WEB --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix cms" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix cms && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix backend && npm i --prefix cms && npm i --prefix frontend
